Object# SubscriptionCreateRequest.Data.Attributes

App Store Connect API 2.0+

```
object SubscriptionCreateRequest.Data.Attributes
```

## [Properties](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/subscriptioncreaterequest/data-data.dictionary/attributes-data.dictionary#properties)

`familySharable``boolean`

`name``string` (Required) 

`productId``string` (Required) 

`reviewNote``string`

`subscriptionPeriod``string`

 Possible Values: `ONE_WEEK, ONE_MONTH, TWO_MONTHS, THREE_MONTHS, SIX_MONTHS, ONE_YEAR``groupLevel``integer`
